content.text:
<user_query>

Search repository /Users/HanHu/software/Experiment-Tracker- for any references to deploy4r.sh and related deployment docs/scripts. Return all referencing file paths with short note on how script is used (manual command, automation, CI, etc.). Also note mismatches between documented usage and script behavior. Thoroughness: medium.
</user_query>

Searches across the Experiment-Tracker repository show:

---

## Summary: No references to `deploy4r.sh`

There are **no references** to `deploy4r.sh` or `deploy4r` anywhere in the repo.

---

## Shell scripts in the repo

| File | Purpose | Usage |
|------|---------|-------|
| `install.sh` | One-shot installer: builds Docker image, copies `Experiment Tracker.app` to `~/Applications` | Manual: run from project root |
| `Experiment Tracker.app/Contents/MacOS/launch` | App launcher: starts Docker container and opens dashboard | Invoked when the app is opened |

---

## Deployment-related content

- No CI configs (e.g. `.github/workflows`, `.gitlab-ci.yml`)
- No docs mentioning deployment or `deploy4r`
- No other deployment scripts

---

## Conclusion

`deploy4r.sh` is not part of this Experiment-Tracker project. It may belong to another repo (e.g. motion-rl, Fuyao, or another deployment tooling project). If you share the other repo path, I can search there instead.
